caption: A video call features multiple participants in a grid layout. A man wearing glasses and a blue shirt, identified as "Jerry Mclalaly," is seen in a room with a window behind him. Beside him, "Ronny Brinkman" wears a gray t-shirt, and another man with a blue shirt and a headset, "Brian", is in a home office. A woman with dark hair, "Sue", is also present. Other participants include "Stuart Starky" in a gray shirt and glasses, "Charles Masao" who is occasionally seen looking upward, "Patrick Muldyn" in a gray shirt, and "Gary Layton" in a blue shirt. A man identified as "Birs_collaborator" wears a green shirt, and "Stringdesignly" wears a blue t-shirt. As the call progresses, the layout shifts, and a new person, "Jim Burke," wearing a light-colored shirt and a headset, appears in the final segment of the sequence.
